detail.description:
Baby Panda's Art Class is in session! 

This is an art classroom designed specifically for children aged 2-5! Games of music, drawing and kids crafts for children to recognize color, learn to draw, sing and dance to music to inspire their interest in the arts.  

Baby Panda's Art Classroom includes following mini-games:

DRAWING GAMES
- Fingerprint Drawing: Imprint fingerprint on the screen and watch it turn into a balloon, grape, leaf…Children can create artwork without a pen! 
- Creative Artwo
